lastSummary: Reviewed the past hour after the 10:01 PM EDT maintenance pass; no new visible project/task/event work landed in the repo and HEAD stayed at de92027.
Recorded the quiet-window state in today's note: the only fresh repo changes were the already-uncommitted continuity updates around the repeated webchat/control-UI outage symptom.
Re-reviewed both long-lived Discord branch state files with no pending shared-important promotions, stamped their review metadata, and preserved git HEAD de92027 before rerunning automated sync.
